mapper.sql: id, clean_indent_number AS cleanIndentNumber, car_type AS carType, clean_type AS cleanType, amount, pay_state AS payState, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM( SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId, CASE clean_type WHEN 1 THEN '普洗' WHEN 2 THEN '精洗' WHEN 3 THEN '自动' WHEN 4 THEN '夜洗' WHEN 5 THEN '免费' ELSE '洗车' END AS cleanName, CASE car_type WHEN 1 THEN '小型轿车' WHEN 2 THEN '小型越野' WHEN 3 THEN '大型越野' WHEN 4 THEN '商务车' ELSE '小型轿车' END AS carName, clean_indent_number cleanIndentNumber,amount, indent_state indentState, CASE indent_state WHEN 2 THEN '服务中' WHEN 3 THEN '待评价' WHEN 4 THEN '已取消' WHEN 5 THEN '已过期' ELSE '已完成' END AS genre, b.url imgUrl,is_evaluation isEvaluation,a.create_time createTime,CONCAT('1') resource,CONCAT('') rescueName, CONCAT('') currentPosition FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as b on a.user_b_id = b.user_b_id WHERE a.user_id = #{id} AND resource = 1 AND b.`index`= 1 AND a.indent_state <> 1
AND a.indent_state = #{type}
union ALL SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId,b.beauty_name cleanName, CASE a.car_type WHEN 1 THEN '小型轿车' WHEN 2 THEN '小型越野' WHEN 3 THEN '大型越野' WHEN 4 THEN '商务车' ELSE '小型轿车' END AS carName,a.clean_indent_number cleanIndentNumber,a.amount, a.indent_state indentState, CASE indent_state WHEN 2 THEN '服务中' WHEN 3 THEN '待评价' WHEN 4 THEN '已取消' WHEN 5 THEN '已过期' ELSE '已完成' END AS genre, c.url imgUrl,is_evaluation isEvaluation,a.create_time createTime,CONCAT('2') resource,CONCAT('') rescueName, CONCAT('') currentPosition FROM app_clean_indet as a LEFT JOIN app_beauty_type as b ON a.clean_type = b.beauty_type LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as c on a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE a.user_id = #{id} AND resource = 2 AND c.`index` = 1 AND a.indent_state <> 1
AND a.indent_state = #{type}
UNION ALL SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId, CASE a.type WHEN 1 THEN '搭电' WHEN 2 THEN '拖车' WHEN 3 THEN '送胎' END AS cleanName,concat('不限车型') carName,a.rescue_number cleanIndentNumber,a.price amount, a.state indentState, CASE a.state WHEN 1 THEN '新订单' WHEN 2 THEN '服务中' WHEN 3 THEN '待评价' WHEN 4 THEN '已取消' WHEN 5 THEN '已评价' ELSE '已完成' END AS genre, b.url imgUrl,concat(1)isEvaluation,a.create_time createTime,CONCAT('3') resource,rescue_name rescueName, current_position currentPosition FROM app_rescue_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_rescue_img as b ON a.type = b.type WHERE a.user_id = #{id} AND a.state <> ''
AND a.state = 1
AND a.state = 2
AND a.state = 3
AND a.state = 5
AND a.state = 4
UNION ALL SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId, concat('喷漆') cleanName,a.brand_type carName,a.spray_paint_number cleanIndentNumber, price amount, a.state indentState, CASE a.state WHEN 1 THEN '新订单' WHEN 2 THEN '新订单' WHEN 3 THEN '服务中' WHEN 4 THEN '服务中' WHEN 5 THEN '服务中' WHEN 6 THEN '服务中' WHEN 7 THEN '待付款' WHEN 8 THEN '待评价' WHEN 10 THEN '已取消' ELSE '已完成' END AS genre, b.url imgUrl,a.is_evaluation isEvaluation,a.create_time createTime, CONCAT('4') resource,CONCAT('') rescueName,a.pick_address currentPosition FROM app_spray_paint_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as b ON a.user_b_id = b.user_b_id WHERE b.`index` = 1 AND a.user_id = #{id}
AND (a.state = 1 or a.state = 2 or a.state = 3)
AND (a.state = 4 or a.state = 5 or a.state = 6 or a.state =7)
AND a.state = 8
AND a.state = 9
AND a.state = 10
UNION ALL SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId, concat('年检') cleanName,concat('不限车型') carName,year_check_number cleanIndentNumber, price amount, state indentState, CASE state WHEN 1 THEN '新订单' WHEN 2 THEN '进行中' WHEN 3 THEN '待评价' WHEN 4 THEN '已取消' WHEN 5 THEN '已完成' ELSE '已完成' END AS genre, b.url imgUrl,concat(1)isEvaluation,a.create_time createTime, CONCAT('5') resource,CONCAT('') rescueName,a.pick_address currentPosition FROM app_year_check_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_merchants_info_banner as b ON a.user_b_id = b.user_b_id WHERE b.`index` = 1 AND a.state <> '' AND a.user_id = #{id}
AND a.state = 1
AND a.state = 2
AND a.state = 3
AND a.state = 5
AND a.state = 4
UNION ALL SELECT a.user_id userId,a.user_b_id userBId, concat('代驾') cleanName,concat('小型轿车') carName,substitute_driving_number cleanIndentNumber, actual_price amount, indent_state indentState, CASE indent_state WHEN 1 THEN '新订单' WHEN 2 THEN '进行中' WHEN 3 THEN '进行中' WHEN 4 THEN '进行中' WHEN 5 THEN '待支付' WHEN 6 THEN '待评价' WHEN 7 THEN '已完成' WHEN 8 THEN '已取消' ELSE '已完成' END as genre, b.url imgUrl,concat(1) isEvaluation,a.create_time createTime, concat('6') resource,concat('') rescueName,a.start_address currentPosition FROM app_substitute_driving_indent as a LEFT JOIN app_lable as b ON b.id = 19 WHERE user_id = #{id} AND a.indent_state <> 0
AND a.indent_state = 11
AND (a.indent_state = 2 or a.indent_state = 3 or a.indent_state = 4 or a.indent_state = 5 )
AND a.indent_state = 6
AND a.indent_state = 7
AND (a.indent_state = 8 or a.indent_state = 9)
) t order by createTime DESC LIMIT #{pagesize},20
SELECT garment_clean FROM app_clean_img WHERE car_type = #{carType}
SELECT fine_clean FROM app_clean_img WHERE car_type = #{carType}
SELECT beauty_name FROM app_beauty_type WHERE beauty_type =#{cleanType}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_clean_indet WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId}
SELECT * FROM app_clean_indet WHERE merchants_pay_number = '免费洗' AND indent_state = 2 AND user_id = #{userid}
SELECT url FROM app_beauty_img WHERE beauty_type = #{cleanType}
